subject: docs(todo): move declined items to HISTORY.md
body:
Declined feature decisions are decision records, not actionable work.
Moved all 8 declined items from TODO.md to HISTORY.md. Updated
CLAUDE.md documentation guidance to clarify that declined/rejected
ideas belong in HISTORY, not TODO.
